name: Greek Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Red bell pepper, cut into strips
3/4 cup Pepperoni slices, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, garlic powder, basil, oregano, pepper, and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the cooked pasta, sliced mushrooms, halved cherry tomatoes, red bell pepper strips, crumbled feta cheese, chopped green onion, black olives, and pepperoni strips to the bowl.
3. Toss all ingredients together gently until evenly coated with the dressing.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 2 hours or overnight to allow flavors to meld and chill thoroughly.
5. Serve chilled.
